TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Roger_Cheng, title = Roger_Cheng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roger_Cheng} }

S.FORM: Roger Cheng Roger Cheng nilacul u siwkay niza Roger Cheng (1959.5.23) , tatama, nalecuh i Taywan Taypak. pahezek nay Congku Lalangawan tabakiaya a cacudadan Mipalaway a Si. u singanganay mitesekay a misabihunay. ciama niza u Hulam a tademaw. wina niza sa, u mipalaway nu Hulam a palaw. 1986 a mihcan, sakacacay mikuwanan ku palaway. nazikuzan sa katuud tu mibaluday a palaway. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 2008 a mihcan, midimut tu lacus'ay 2012 a mihcan, asangulan kisu :Roger sakacacay pasangulan a cudad u takus-sakamu niza Head & Shoulders, Max Factor, J'code, 7-11, Yamani CASA, Samsung dingki, Siantay kazizeng i30
S.PHON: *og…ôr ¶ńß…ôŇč *og…ôr ¶ńß…ôŇč nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u siwkaj niza *og…ôr ¶ńß…ôŇč (****.*.**) , tatama, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i tajwan tajpak. pańß…ôz…ôk naj ¶oŇčku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tabakiaja a ¶a ¶udadan mipar~…ĺawaj a si. u siŇčaŇčanaj mit…ôs…ôkaj a misabińßunaj. ¶iama niza u ńßur~…ĺam a tad…ômaw. wina niza sa, u mipar~…ĺawaj nu ńßur~…ĺam a par~…ĺaw. **** a mińß ¶an, saka ¶a ¶aj mikuwanan ku par~…ĺawaj. nazikuzan sa katuud tu mibar~…ĺudaj a par~…ĺawaj. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** a mińß ¶an, midimut tu r~…ĺa ¶us Ē~ °aj **** a mińß ¶an, asaŇčur~…ĺan kisu :*og…ôr saka ¶a ¶aj pasaŇčur~…ĺan a ¶udad u takus-sakamu niza ńß…ôad & sńßour~…ĺd…ôrs, ma* fa ¶tor, * Ē~ ° ¶od…ô, *-**, jamani ¶asa, samsuŇč diŇčki, siantaj kaziz…ôŇč i**
S.FORM: Roger Cheng Roger Cheng nilacul u siwkay niza Roger Cheng (1959.5.23) , tatama, nalecuh i Taywan Taypak. pahezek nay Congku Lalangawan tabakiaya a cacudadan Mipalaway a Si. u singanganay mitesekay a misabihunay. ciama niza u Hulam a tademaw. wina niza sa, u mipalaway nu Hulam a palaw. 1986 a mihcan, sakacacay mikuwanan ku palaway. nazikuzan sa katuud tu mibaluday a palaway. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 2008 a mihcan, midimut tu lacus'ay 2012 a mihcan, asangulan kisu :Roger sakacacay pasangulan a cudad u takus-sakamu niza Head & Shoulders, Max Factor, J'code, 7-11, Yamani CASA, Samsung dingki, Siantay kazizeng i30
